name: Refill request without medication name
description: Patient requests a refill but can't remember the medication name, only its use.
goal: Get a refill for the medication used to control blood pressure.
behavior: Sound a bit confused about the medication name
Mention it is for blood pressure control
Provide any additional information like the color or shape of the pill if asked
success_criteria: Agent must confirm the medication based on its use and description
Agent should verify the patient's identity and prescription history
Agent should complete the refill process or explain the next steps if necessary
orchestrator_hint: Patient requests a refill for a medication but doesn't remember the name, only describing its use.
